summary: Consensus Buy from 34 analysts: 41% Strong Buy, 38% Buy, 21% Hold, 0% Sell. Avg PT ~$297. Bull: $380 (Melius Research). Bear: $120. Notable: DA Davidson $375, Susquehanna $375, Stifel $320, Northland $260.
